section.heading: Procurement of detection equipment for United States border security
section.chapeau: Of the amount authorized to be appropriated by section 301,11 See References in Text note below. $15,000,000 is available for the procurement of—

paragraph.content: equipment capable of detecting the movement of weapons of mass destruction and related materials into the United States;
equipment capable of interdicting the movement of weapons of mass destruction and related materials into the United States; and
materials and technologies related to use of equipment described in paragraph (1) or (2).

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Section 301, referred to in text, is section 301 of Pub. L. 104–201, div. A, title III, Sept. 23, 1996, 110 Stat. 2475, which is not classified to the Code.
